title: Red Hat Security Advisory: jmc security update
overview:
An update for jmc is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.6 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

affected_products: Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder EUS (v.9.6)
full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: jmc security update

An update for jmc is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.6 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for jmc is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.6 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
jmc-8.2.0-18.el9_6.2.src.rpm
jmc-8.2.0-18.el9_6.2.x86_64.rpm

CVE-2025-66566: A flaw was found in lz4-java. This vulnerability allows disclosure of sensitive data via crafted compressed input due to insufficient clearing of the output buffer in Java-based decompressor implementations.
